economic_notes: Nation operates Quatsino Economic Development Limited Partnership (99.9% owned), Quatsino First Nation Economic Development Corporation Ltd. (wholly owned), Gilakasla Kwa Holdings Ltd. (33%), and Gwabalis Fisheries Society (25%). Economic activities include marine operations, forestry, wind farm, arcade, and fisheries. COVID-19 impacted operations in 2020-2021.
notes: Audit is qualified due to Quatsino Economic Development Limited Partnership not being subject to audit procedures, making it impossible to determine if adjustments were needed to investment balances, earnings, and accumulated surplus. CMHC Housing is fully consolidated. Four entities accounted for under modified equity method: Quatsino Economic Development Limited Partnership (99.9%), Quatsino First Nation Economic Development Corporation Ltd. (wholly owned), Gilakasla Kwa Holdings Ltd. (33%), and Gwabalis Fisheries Society (25%). Prior year figures restated per Note 17. Financial statements signed March 15, 2022 for year ended March 31, 2021. Transfer to Nation Members of $609,500 recorded. Total government transfers estimated as ISC $3,351,589 + FNHA $1,175,201 + DFO $334,757 + CMHC $181,563 + Province of BC $1,498,074 + FNESC $588,961 + First Nation organizations $291,857 + NVIAAMS $39,706 = $7,461,708 plus trust funds $14,985 = approximately $7,476,693; OSR estimated accordingly. expenses_housing combines Housing $24,088 and Social Housing CMHC $398,582.
